element.name: Astarion’s Book of Hungers
element.description:
Fight, flirt, or feast your way through the shadows of Baldur's Gate in this digital expansion, complete with new character options, devilish monsters, and tavern-set escapades dripping with blood and intrigue.

Join Astarion in 2 play-ready digital adventures and explore the seductive horrors of vampiric power with new backgrounds, feats, and more.
